mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gra_project.meteor_data (user_id, task_id, station_id, element_code, datetime, value) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.stationId}, #{item.elementCode}, #{item.datetime}, #{item.value})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT station_id) FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT element_code) FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY datetime DESC LIMIT 1000
SELECT * FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY datetime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ws.province, AVG(m.value) AS avg_value, MIN(m.value) AS min_value, MAX(m.value) AS max_value, COUNT(DISTINCT m.station_id) AS station_count FROM gra_project.meteor_data m JOIN gra_project.weather_stations ws ON CAST(m.station_id AS VARCHAR) = ws.station_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.element_code = #{elementCode} AND m.datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY ws.province
SELECT * FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT MIN(datetime) AS "minTime", MAX(datetime) AS "maxTime", COUNT(*) AS "dataCount" FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND element_code = #{elementCode}
SELECT element_code AS "elementCode", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM gra_project.meteor_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY element_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
